---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea, improvement, or new capability for Inspira.
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["feature", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

We love feature requests that start from a real user problem. The sharper the "why," the more likely this is to land.

## The problem

What are you trying to do? What's frustrating, missing, or slower than it should be today? Write this from your own perspective — no need to propose a solution yet.

## Proposed solution

If you already have an idea of what this could look like in Inspira, sketch it here. Rough is fine. Screenshots, napkin drawings, links to other tools doing it well — all welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you've worked around this, or shapes the feature could take. Even short notes here help us understand the space.

## Who does this help

Who benefits, and in what kind of moment? (For example: "someone using Inspira for academic research, when the topic tree gets wide enough that scrolling gets tedious.") This helps us tell whether a request is niche or widely felt.

## Additional context

Anything else worth sharing — related issues, prior discussions, links to examples.
